decision: Scope = B: skeleton + config.py implement thật, không implement adapter GitHub/LLM/Redis
reasoning: config.py là dependency của mọi module sau; đủ giá trị cho commit đầu mà không over-scope
rejected: A — skeleton only (quá minimal, không có contract rõ)
C — tất cả ports có test (over-scope cho foundation)

decision: CI jobs = ruff lint+format + pytest + coverage gate ≥80%. Không có mypy/pyright
reasoning: Enforce coverage gate từ commit đầu tránh nợ kỹ thuật; mypy thêm setup cost không cần thiết ở foundation
rejected: A — lint+test only (không enforce coverage gate)

decision: Redis dev setup = FakeSummaryCache in-memory. Không có docker-compose hay mise redis plugin ở foundation
reasoning: Redis adapter thật thuộc feature S4-Summarizer; foundation không cần external service để chạy test

decision: Unknown keys trong config.toml bị bỏ qua (không strict parse)
reasoning: Strict parse gây config cũ không tương thích khi thêm field; CLI cá nhân ưu tiên forgiveness hơn strictness
rejected: Strict mode — fail on unknown keys

decision: lookback_days > 365 → warning, không fail. lookback_days ≤ 0 → fail fast
reasoning: Cap cứng 365 có thể ảnh hưởng legitimate use case; warning đủ để alert mà không block

decision: LLM API key không bắt buộc khi validate config (Ollama local không cần key)
reasoning: LiteLLM hỗ trợ local provider không cần key; chỉ GITHUB_TOKEN là bắt buộc ở mọi trường hợp

decision: load_config() returns Config with watched_repos, lookback_days, github_token on happy path
reasoning: Core contract for config module — all downstream features depend on this shape

decision: ports.py and pipeline.py stubs excluded from coverage via pyproject.toml omit
reasoning: Stubs have no executable logic; including them would require trivial tests and artificially drag coverage

decision: All ConfigError caught at CLI boundary, printed as Error: <msg> to stderr, non-zero exit
reasoning: Raw tracebacks degrade UX and leak internal implementation detail to operator
rejected: Let Typer handle exceptions natively (shows traceback)

decision: lookback_days defaults to 7 when omitted
reasoning: Spec user flow examples use 7 days; explicit default prevents crash on omitted field

decision: lookback_days > 365 emits warning but does not fail
reasoning: Hard cap blocks legitimate backfill use case; warning is sufficient alert

decision: Ollama (local) LLM provider requires no API key
reasoning: LiteLLM supports local providers with no key; forcing one would break local-only setup

decision: Hand-written validation in config.py instead of Pydantic
reasoning: ACs require specific error message substrings and explicit type rejection (EC-05: float must not coerce to int); manual validation gives exact control and keeps foundation dependency-light
rejected: Pydantic v2 (heavy dep, default messages mismatch ACs, coercion masks EC-05)

decision: Port interfaces use typing.Protocol not abc.ABC
reasoning: Structural typing matches ports/adapters philosophy; test fakes need no inheritance
rejected: abc.ABC (requires explicit inheritance, more boilerplate for fakes)

decision: WatchedRepo stores owner+name fields with full_name property, parsed at config time
reasoning: Fail-fast parse once (BR-1-003); downstream never re-parses raw string
rejected: Store raw owner/name string (forces every consumer to re-parse/re-validate)

decision: Coverage omits ports.py+pipeline.py only; measures config.py/cli.py/models.py against 80% gate
reasoning: Forces the risky CLI boundary (BR-1-007) to be tested, not just config; stubs have no logic
rejected: Measure only config.py (hides untested cli.py wiring)

decision: openapi.yaml has paths:{} + x-cli-commands extension; no HTTP surface
reasoning: CLI tool has no HTTP API; R5 requires the file to exist, content honestly documents CLI contract instead of inventing endpoints
rejected: Invent fake HTTP endpoints to fill openapi

decision: lookback_days validated with type() is int to reject bool
reasoning: bool is subclass of int in Python; lookback_days=true would otherwise pass as 1

decision: Added @app.callback() no-op to cli.py to prevent Typer 0.26 single-command promotion
reasoning: Typer promotes a single @app.command() to root when no @app.callback() is present; this broke the 'run' subcommand structure required by AC-1-028

decision: _resolve_llm reads api_key_env from config to allow custom env var name (default LLM_API_KEY)
reasoning: Design doesn't specify which env var holds the LLM key; LLM_API_KEY is a reasonable default; made it configurable for future flexibility

decision: Added [tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages=[src/osspulse] to pyproject.toml for hatchling src layout
reasoning: hatchling requires explicit package path for src layout; without it uv sync fails to build the editable wheel

decision: Used plain CliRunner() without mix_stderr — Typer 0.26 doesn't accept mix_stderr kwarg
reasoning: typer.testing.CliRunner in 0.26 has no mix_stderr param; result.stderr still works correctly without it

decision: FileNotFoundError not caught in config.py — raw traceback leaks at CLI when config file missing
reasoning: S4 code bug — open() only catches PermissionError, not FileNotFoundError; BR-1-007 boundary violated; 1-line fix in config.py

decision: test_run_missing_token_exits_nonzero is hollow — passes only when GITHUB_TOKEN absent from real os.environ
reasoning: S4 code bug — cli.py calls load_config(config) with no env arg; runner.invoke(env={}) does not override os.environ; test is environment-dependent, not reliable

decision: test_watched_repo_frozen uses bare try/except Exception which masks unrelated exceptions
reasoning: S4 code bug — should use pytest.raises(dataclasses.FrozenInstanceError); current form passes for wrong reasons

decision: No test for [watchlist] present but repos key absent (distinct from empty list)
reasoning: S4 edge case — _validate_repos handles it correctly but path is untested

decision: lookback_days=false (bool False) not tested — only true (bool True) is covered for bool trap
reasoning: S4 edge case — type() check correctly rejects False too but symmetric case has no test

decision: Added except FileNotFoundError to open() try block in config.py → ConfigError('cannot read {path}: file not found')
reasoning: BR-1-007: all exceptions from config file reading must be converted to ConfigError at config.py boundary; PermissionError was caught but FileNotFoundError was not

decision: cli.py now passes dict(os.environ) to load_config(); test drops env={} and relies on monkeypatch.delenv only
reasoning: Runner.invoke(env={}) does not override os.environ; explicit env passing makes CLI testable without monkeypatching internals; monkeypatch.delenv correctly mutates os.environ before call
rejected: fix test only without changing cli.py (less clean, still couples to os.environ internals)

decision: test_watched_repo_frozen replaced bare try/except Exception with pytest.raises(dataclasses.FrozenInstanceError)
reasoning: Bare try/except passes silently for any exception; pytest.raises asserts the exact exception type

decision: Added test_repos_key_absent for [watchlist] present but repos key missing
reasoning: Edge case: watchlist.get('repos') returns None which is caught by 'if not repos_raw' — same message as empty list; test documents this path explicitly

decision: Added test_lookback_days_false_rejected for lookback_days=false
reasoning: Bool trap symmetric case — false also rejected by type() is not int; completing the pair with true

decision: GO — all 5 bugs fixed and verified, 33/33 tests pass, 98% coverage, all smoke tests clean
reasoning: BUG-1 verified by smoke (no traceback on missing file); BUG-2 verified by running test with GITHUB_TOKEN set in env; BUG-3/4/5 verified by code review and test execution
